## AgentAddressSchema variable

Zod schema for a persisted agent-address association.

**Signature:**

```typescript

	{
		id: z.ZodString
		createdAt: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>
		updatedAt: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>

		addressId: z.ZodString
		role: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodEnum<['home', 'office', 'mailing', 'billing', 'other']>>
		isPrimary: z.ZodDefault<z.ZodBoolean>
		validFrom: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'DateOnlyISO'>>
		validTo: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'DateOnlyISO'>>
	},
	'strict',
```
